# [LinuxOS] init-ui.el 

```default
;;; init-ui.el --- Visual appearance and fonts (Linux optimized)

(use-package doom-themes
  :ensure t
  :config
  (condition-case nil
      (load-theme 'doom-one t)
    (error
     (progn
       (message "doom-one not found, falling back to wombat theme.")
       (load-theme 'wombat t)))))

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; Font configuration (Linux / Ubuntu / HiDPI aware)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(defun my/get-linux-font ()
  "Return best available font on Linux."
  (cond
   ((member "JetBrains Mono" (font-family-list)) "JetBrains Mono")
   ((member "Fira Code" (font-family-list)) "Fira Code")
   ((member "DejaVu Sans Mono" (font-family-list)) "DejaVu Sans Mono")
   ((member "Noto Sans Mono" (font-family-list)) "Noto Sans Mono")
   (t "monospace")))

(defun my/calc-font-size (width)
  "Return font size based on screen width (Linux optimized)."
  (cond
   ((> width 3000) 200)
   ((> width 2500) 190)
   ((> width 1920) 180)
   ((> width 1400) 160)
   (t 140)))

(defun my/setup-font-based-on-resolution ()
  "Auto-adjust font for GUI; fallback for terminal."
  (interactive)
  (if (display-graphic-p)
      (let* ((display-width (display-pixel-width))
             (font (my/get-linux-font))
             (size (my/calc-font-size display-width)))
        (set-face-attribute 'default nil
                            :font font
                            :height size)
        (message "GUI: Font set to %s (%d)" font size))
    ;; terminal fallback
    (set-face-attribute 'default nil :height 130)
    (message "TTY: Terminal font fallback applied")))

(add-hook 'window-setup-hook #'my/setup-font-based-on-resolution)

;; -------------------------------------------------------
;; UI behavior (Linux-friendly defaults)
;; -------------------------------------------------------

(global-display-line-numbers-mode 1)
(setq display-line-numbers-type 'relative)

(global-visual-line-mode 1)

;; Better scrolling experience on Linux laptops
(setq scroll-conservatively 101
      scroll-margin 3
      scroll-step 1)

;; Reduce UI clutter
(menu-bar-mode -1)
(tool-bar-mode -1)
(scroll-bar-mode -1)

;; Cursor behavior (more modern feel)
(blink-cursor-mode 0)

(provide 'init-ui)
;;; init-ui.el ends here
```
